product_surfaces: MCP JSON-RPC error data (writeDomainError -> mcpDiagnostic -> diagnostics.Classify)
Service error wrapping (ErrSyncFailure, ErrWriteFailure preserving cause/failure-source metadata)
Diagnostics classifier precedence (classifyCode with live-http ProviderMode)
mocks_used: typed error structs (gitcode.ErrAPIValidation, gitcode.ErrNotFound, gitcode.ErrConflict, gitcode.ErrRemoteCollision, gitcode.ErrRemoteNotFound, gitcode.ErrPayloadTooLarge, gitcode.ErrPartialResponse, gitcode.ErrRateLimited, gitcode.ErrAuthExpired, gitcode.ErrNetworkUnavailable, gitcode.ErrUnauthorized, gitcode.ErrSchemaDecode)
service.ErrSyncFailure and service.ErrWriteFailure wrapper structs with Cause/PayloadSource/Code/Mode fields

scenarios.description: All package tests pass offline with no credentials, network, SSH agent, or Keychain; git diff --check passes
CLI and MCP tests with mocked GitCode responses prove visible failure_classes are exactly api_validation, schema_decode, config_credential, or live_transport_failure; decommissioned classes absent

decommission-4.description: 400/schema/decode failures classified as live_transport_failure or configuration failure
decommission-4.verification: CLI tests call assertNoDecommissionedFailureClass for every API/schema/decode failure path. Diagnostics classifier has SCN-DIAG-DECOM-01 through 05 explicitly testing that 400, malformed JSON, schema mismatch, partial response, and local body limit never produce decommissioned codes. MCP error rendering tests assert correct canonical failure_class without decommissioned values.

outcome-7.description: Error classification cleanup: API validation, schema/decode, credential/configuration, and transport failures are visibly distinct
outcome-7.evidence: All 12 CLI failure modes and 12 MCP failure modes tested with expected canonical failure_class. Decommission invariant enforced across all API/schema/decode failure paths.

outcome-1.description: Route/schema matrix exercised through runtime code paths
outcome-1.evidence: CLI integration tests exercise live provider through MockGitCodeAPI httptest.Server, exercising route dispatch and error classification integration

outcome-3.description: Label encoding and normalization with GitCode-correct shapes
outcome-3.evidence: Error classification tests for schema_decode cover malformed label response scenarios

outcome-5.description: PR/comment deferred routes return unsupported capability diagnostics
outcome-5.evidence: Deferred surfaces produce unsupported_capability diagnostics, not transport failures

outcome-10.description: go test ./... passes without real credentials, network, SSH agent, or Keychain
outcome-10.evidence: All package tests pass offline; all CLI tests use MockGitCodeAPI httptest.Server; all MCP tests use typed error structs
